destinations.evidence: The destination keeps the typed verifier error enum and block-local/system classification surface, with v2.2-specific grouped variants for async settlement, SPC, nonce-lock, scheduled, and parent-state failures.

atoms.equivalence_argument: The old downstream verifier error surface is preserved behaviorally in the v2.2 port.
